faq.label: Questions, answered
faq.title: Clarity before you connect.
faq.description: The essentials about setup, control, integrations, and security.

items.question: How quickly can we launch our first workflow?
items.answer: Most teams connect their core tools and launch a first workflow in under 30 minutes. Templates cover common lead routing, qualification, CRM hygiene, and follow-up scenarios.

items.question: Does FlowPilot replace our CRM?
items.answer: No. FlowPilot is the intelligent orchestration layer around your CRM. It keeps data current and coordinates actions across the rest of your stack.

items.question: Can people review AI decisions?
items.answer: Yes. You control confidence thresholds, approval steps, fallback owners, and audit history. High-impact decisions can always require human review.

items.question: Which tools does FlowPilot integrate with?
items.answer: The platform supports major CRMs, email providers, form tools, calendars, data warehouses, and team messaging products through native connectors and webhooks.

items.question: Is our customer data secure?
items.answer: FlowPilot is designed around least-privilege access, encrypted data, scoped credentials, and detailed activity logs. Enterprise plans include custom retention and access controls.
